description: LN4 built-in function catalog exported from PeopleNet repository

groups.0110: Funciones de base de datos lógica
groups.0140: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT

CLCCOMPILE.name: CLCCOMPILE
CLCCOMPILE.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT

COMPILEBLOCK.name: COMPILEBLOCK
COMPILEBLOCK.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
COMPILEBLOCK.comment: Compiles all items of the current block for rules (defined in Rules).

CLCCHECKSYNTAX.name: CLCCHECKSYNTAX
CLCCHECKSYNTAX.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCCHECKSYNTAX.comment: Returns, if the syntax is correct or not.

CLCRESTORESOURCE.name: CLCRESTORESOURCE
CLCRESTORESOURCE.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCRESTORESOURCE.comment: Changes the LN4 formula, from its Database format to its usual format.

CLCSOURCETONUMBER.name: CLCSOURCETONUMBER
CLCSOURCETONUMBER.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCSOURCETONUMBER.comment: Returns the LN4 formula, with its items changed to their ID_SYNONYM ( with # ).

CLCSOURCETOSTRING.name: CLCSOURCETOSTRING
CLCSOURCETOSTRING.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCSOURCETOSTRING.comment: Returns the LN4 formula, with its items changed to their N_SYNONYM (with @ ).

CLCSOURCETOID.name: CLCSOURCETOID
CLCSOURCETOID.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCSOURCETOID.comment: Returns the LN4 formula, with its items changed to their ID_ITEM.

LOCALTEST.name: LOCALTEST
LOCALTEST.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
LOCALTEST.comment: Executes actual formula based on its polish code. Code is interpreted.

ADDREGISTER.name: ADDREGISTER
ADDREGISTER.comment: Adds a record at the end of the current node. Current position is set to the new record.

INSERTREGISTER.name: INSERTREGISTER
INSERTREGISTER.comment: Inserts a record just bellow current position of the current node. Current position is set to the new record.

DELETEREGISTER.name: DELETEREGISTER
DELETEREGISTER.comment: Marks as deleted the current record.

DELETEALLREGISTERS.name: DELETEALLREGISTERS
DELETEALLREGISTERS.comment: Marks as deleted all records in this recordset.

DESTROYBLOCK.name: DESTROYBLOCK
DESTROYBLOCK.comment: Eliminates fron memory all records in this block (recorset) and the block itselt, so the block stands as not loaded.

BEGIN.name: BEGIN
BEGIN.comment: Moves the current record to the first record in the recordset.

END.name: END
END.comment: Moves the current record to the last record in the recordset.

MOVETOEOF.name: MOVETOEOF
MOVETOEOF.comment: Moves the current record to EOF.

COUNT.name: COUNT
COUNT.comment: Returns the number of records in the actual recorset.

ISEOF.name: ISEOF
ISEOF.comment: Returns whether the current record is at EOF or not.

ISDELETED.name: ISDELETED
ISDELETED.comment: Returns TRUE if the record is marked as deleted.

ISNEW.name: ISNEW
ISNEW.comment: Returns TRUE if the record is marked as new.

ISUPDATED.name: ISUPDATED
ISUPDATED.comment: Returns TRUE if the record is marked as updated.

ISUPDATEDDB.name: ISUPDATEDDB
ISUPDATEDDB.comment: Returns TRUE if the record is flagged as updated for database transactions.

CLONEREGISTER.name: CLONEREGISTER
CLONEREGISTER.comment: Adds a register and copies in it the values of  the current register.

REMOVEFILTER.name: REMOVEFILTER
REMOVEFILTER.comment: Removes the last filter in RAM added to a node.

CLEANFILTER.name: CLEANFILTER
CLEANFILTER.comment: Removes all filters in RAM added to a node.

REFRESHFILTER.name: REFRESHFILTER
REFRESHFILTER.comment: Refreshes a static filter in RAM added to a node.

BEGINTRANSACTION.name: BEGINTRANSACTION
BEGINTRANSACTION.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
BEGINTRANSACTION.comment: Begins both, a Virtual Machine and a database transaction.

EXECUTESQL.name: EXECUTESQL
EXECUTESQL.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
EXECUTESQL.comment:
Execute a Logical SQL Statement.
It accepts zero or more variable arguments corresponding to the statement parameters.

BEGINDBTRANSACTION.name: BEGINDBTRANSACTION
BEGINDBTRANSACTION.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica

LOAD_BLK.name: LOAD_BLK
LOAD_BLK.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
LOAD_BLK.comment: Loads data from database in the current recorset.

LOAD_PRG.name: LOAD_PRG
LOAD_PRG.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
LOAD_PRG.comment:
Calls Load_blk item.
Its purpose its to be connected to Load_prg items in child nodes.

DELETE_BLK.name: DELETE_BLK
DELETE_BLK.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
DELETE_BLK.comment: Deletes in database all records in currents recordset marked to be deleted.

DELETE_PRG.name: DELETE_PRG
DELETE_PRG.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
DELETE_PRG.comment:
Calls Delete_blk item.
Its purpose its to be connected to Delete_blk items in child nodes.

UPDATE_BLK.name: UPDATE_BLK
UPDATE_BLK.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
UPDATE_BLK.comment: Updates in database all records in currents recordset marked to be updated.

UPDATE_PRG.name: UPDATE_PRG
UPDATE_PRG.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
UPDATE_PRG.comment:
Calls Update_blk item.
Its purpose its to be connected to Update_prg items in child nodes.

INSERT_BLK.name: INSERT_BLK
INSERT_BLK.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
INSERT_BLK.comment: Inserts in database all records in currents recordset marked to be inserted.

INSERT_PRG.name: INSERT_PRG
INSERT_PRG.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
INSERT_PRG.comment:
Calls Insert_blk item.
Its purpose its to be connected to Insert_prg items in child nodes.

PERSIST_TREE.name: PERSIST_TREE
PERSIST_TREE.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
PERSIST_TREE.comment: Performs the persistence in database of a tree branch by calling BeginTransaction, Delete_prg, Update_prg , Insert_prg and EndTransaction.

GETAUTOLOADMODE.name: GETAUTOLOADMODE
GETAUTOLOADMODE.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
GETAUTOLOADMODE.comment: Returns the current meta4object autoload mode.

GETNODEAUTOLOADMODE.name: GETNODEAUTOLOADMODE
GETNODEAUTOLOADMODE.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
GETNODEAUTOLOADMODE.comment: Returns the current node autoload mode.

DUMPREGISTER.name: DUMPREGISTER
DUMPREGISTER.comment:
Dumps the current record to a file.
It is for debuging purposes.

DUMPNODE.name: DUMPNODE
DUMPNODE.comment:
Dumps the current Node to a file.
It is for debuging purposes.

DUMPCHANNEL.name: DUMPCHANNEL
DUMPCHANNEL.comment:
Dumps the meta4object to a file. 
It is for debuging purposes.

SETINSERTED.name: SETINSERTED
SETINSERTED.comment: Marks the actual record as inserted, so it will be persisted. It is only applicable to records without marks.

GETARGUMENTNUMBER.name: GETARGUMENTNUMBER
GETARGUMENTNUMBER.comment: Returns the number of arguments passed to the item (fixed + variable if any).

CREATEORGCHART.name: CREATEORGCHART
CREATEORGCHART.comment: Creates the organization chart for payroll purposes to be then executed with ApplyValue 1.

TODAY.name: TODAY
TODAY.comment: Returns system date in local time.

TODAYNOW.name: TODAYNOW
TODAYNOW.comment: Returns system date with hh, mm and seconds in localtime.

GETCHANNELID.name: GETCHANNELID
GETCHANNELID.comment: Returns the identifier of the current meta4object.

GETTHISNODEID.name: GETTHISNODEID
GETTHISNODEID.comment: Returns the identifier of the current node.

GETLOGSIZE.name: GETLOGSIZE
GETLOGSIZE.comment: Returns the number of elements in the error queue.

CHECKPOINTREGISTER.name: CHECKPOINTREGISTER
CHECKPOINTREGISTER.comment: Commits the former transaction and starts a new one at record scope.

CHECKPOINTBLOCK.name: CHECKPOINTBLOCK
CHECKPOINTBLOCK.comment: Commits the former transaction and starts a new one at block (recordset) scope.

CHECKPOINTNODE.name: CHECKPOINTNODE
CHECKPOINTNODE.comment: Commits the former transaction and starts a new one at node scope.

CHECKPOINTCHANNEL.name: CHECKPOINTCHANNEL
CHECKPOINTCHANNEL.comment: Commits the former transaction and starts a new one at meta4object scope.

UNDOREGISTER.name: UNDOREGISTER
UNDOREGISTER.comment: Rollbacks the transaction in the record.

UNDOBLOCK.name: UNDOBLOCK
UNDOBLOCK.comment: Rollbacks the transaction in the block (recordset).

UNDONODE.name: UNDONODE
UNDONODE.comment: Rollbacks the transaction in the node.

UNDOCHANNEL.name: UNDOCHANNEL
UNDOCHANNEL.comment: Rollbacks the transaction in the whole meta4object.

LOAD.name: LOAD
LOAD.comment:
Loads from database the contents of a meta4object.
It is a meta4object function.

PERSIST.name: PERSIST
PERSIST.comment:
Persists to database the contents a meta4object.
It is a meta4object function.

RELEASE.name: RELEASE
RELEASE.comment:
Releases from memory the contents of a meta4object.
It is a meta4object function.

MOVETO.name: MOVETO
MOVETO.comment: Moves the current record to the indicated position.

SETVALUE.name: SETVALUE
SETVALUE.comment:
Assigns a value to an item especified by node and item identifier.
If record argument is -1, current one is used.
Slice argument is optional.
If executing with slices and slice argument is not specified current slice is used.

GETVALUE.name: GETVALUE
GETVALUE.comment:
Returns the value of an item given by node and item identifier.
If record argument is -1, current one is used.
Slice argument is optional.
If executing with slices and slice argument is not specified current slice is used.

ISNULL.name: ISNULL
ISNULL.comment: Returns whether variable given by argument  is NULL or not.

MESSAGEBOX.name: MESSAGEBOX
MESSAGEBOX.comment:
Shows a message.
Only first two parameters must be character strings not subsequent ones.

ROUND.name: ROUND
ROUND.comment:
Rounds off
Number
 Prec >0 rounds after decimal point
 Prec < 0 rounds before
Date
 Prec 1-6 (1= year,  6 seconds)
String
 Prec > 0 number of characters from the beginning
 Prec < 0 characters from the end
If precision isn't a number returns 0

MID.name: MID
MID.comment:
Returns Length characters from the index Start
Index begins in 0
If Value is NULL returns NULL.
If error returns Value.
If Start<0 Start=0.
If Length<0 Length=0.
If Start+Length > length of Value then Length is equal to the end of the string Value

COMMONTIME.name: COMMONTIME
COMMONTIME.comment:
Returns common time shared between two time intervals.
If any of the paramweters is NULL returns NULL.

FORMAT.name: FORMAT
FORMAT.comment:
Formats a number to as many decimals places as indicated by Precission.
If Number or Precission is NULL returns NULL.

DAYOFTHEWEEK.name: DAYOFTHEWEEK
DAYOFTHEWEEK.comment:
Returns the day of the week (1-7) of a given date.
If Date is NULL returns NULL.

MONTHS.name: MONTHS
MONTHS.comment:
Returns number of months between two dates.
If any of the parameters is NULL returns NULL.

YEARS.name: YEARS
YEARS.comment:
Returns number of years between two dates.
If any of the parameters is NULL returns NULL.

ABS.name: ABS
ABS.comment:
Returns the absolute value.
For dates, hours are omitted and set to 0:0:0.
If Parameter is NULL returns NULL

DATE30.name: DATE30
DATE30.comment:
Returns the date using a 30-day month calendar (typical for payroll).
If Date is NULL returns NULL.

ADDMONTHS.name: ADDMONTHS
ADDMONTHS.comment:
Adds months to a date.
If Date isn't a date returns 0.
If months isn't a number returns Date.

ADDYEARS.name: ADDYEARS
ADDYEARS.comment:
Adds years to a date.
If Date isn't a date, returns 0.
If yeas isn't a number returns Date.

FRACTION.name: FRACTION
FRACTION.comment:
Returns the decimal number.
If Number is NULL returns NULL.

DIV.name: DIV
DIV.comment:
Returns the remainder of a division. 
If any of the paraemters is NULL returns NULL .
If error returns M4_ERROR. 
If second parameters is 0 returns 0.

BOUND.name: BOUND
BOUND.comment:
Returns the smallest number and the largest number between the two delimiters.
If any of the paremeters is NULL returns NULL.

DAYSOFYEAR.name: DAYSOFYEAR
DAYSOFYEAR.comment:
Returns the number of days in the year given by the parameter.
If Number is NULL returns NULL.

DAYSOFMONTH.name: DAYSOFMONTH
DAYSOFMONTH.comment:
Returns the number of days in the month given by the paraemter date.
If Date is NULL returns NULL.

POWER.name: POWER
POWER.comment:
Raises a number to a power indicated by the second argument.
If any of the parameters is NULL returns NULL.

PERCENTAGE.name: PERCENTAGE
PERCENTAGE.comment:
Calculates the percentage of a total.
If any of the parameters is NULL returns NULL
If total is 0 returns 0.

TOINT.name: TOINT
TOINT.comment:
Changes a value to an integer.
If it fails returns 0.

TODOUBLE.name: TODOUBLE
TODOUBLE.comment:
Changes a value to a double.
If it fails returns 0.

TOSTRING.name: TOSTRING
TOSTRING.comment:
Changes a value to a string.
If it fails returns an empty string.

TODATE.name: TODATE
TODATE.comment:
Changes a value to a date.
If it fails returns 0.

TRUNCATE.name: TRUNCATE
TRUNCATE.comment:
Similar to Round, except that it just truncates numbers.
If Precission  is Null returns NULL.

DATETONUMBERS.name: DATETONUMBERS
DATETONUMBERS.comment:
Changes a date to year, month and day and returns success or failure.
If Date is NULL returns all parameters with NULL.

DATETOALLNUMBERS.name: DATETOALLNUMBERS
DATETOALLNUMBERS.comment:
Changes a date to year, month, day, hour, minutes and seconds and returns success or failure.
If Date is NULL returns all parameters with NULL.

NUMBERSTODATE.name: NUMBERSTODATE
NUMBERSTODATE.comment:
Changes numbers to date format: year-month-day hours:minutes:seconds.
At least the year must be specified.
Values that are not indicated default to:
Month: 1
Day : 1
Hour : 0
Minutes : 0
Seconds : 0

STRIN.name: STRIN
STRIN.comment:
Looks for string2 in string1 and returns the position where it is found or -1 if nothing is found.
If String1 or String2 are NULL returns NULL.

INITFILE.name: INITFILE
INITFILE.comment:
Writes the input value in the file specified, writing over the contents of the file.
AddEOL (true/false) says if you want to add a new line after writing to file. By default it is true.

CONCATFILE.name: CONCATFILE
CONCATFILE.comment:
Adds the input value in the file specified.
AddEOL (true/false) says if you want to add a new line after writing to file. By default it is true.

SETSTARTDATE.name: SETSTARTDATE
SETSTARTDATE.comment:
Sets execution start date.
If Date is Null returns NULL.

SETENDDATE.name: SETENDDATE
SETENDDATE.comment:
Sets execution end date.
If Date is Null returns NULL.

SETRUNDATE.name: SETRUNDATE
SETRUNDATE.comment:
Sets execution run date.
If Date is Null returns NULL.

CLCEXECUTEJIT.name: CLCEXECUTEJIT
CLCEXECUTEJIT.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCEXECUTEJIT.comment:
Executes code referenced by a handle (previously compiled by clcPrepareJIT)
It uses the rest of the parameters as arguments to the code.

CLCRELEASEJIT.name: CLCRELEASEJIT
CLCRELEASEJIT.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCRELEASEJIT.comment: Deletes code referenced by a handle (previously compiled by clcPrepareJIT).

EXECUTEDIRECTSQL.name: EXECUTEDIRECTSQL
EXECUTEDIRECTSQL.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
EXECUTEDIRECTSQL.comment: Execute a Logical SQL Statement with a logical connection identificator and a valdation mask.

EXECUTEREALSQL.name: EXECUTEREALSQL
EXECUTEREALSQL.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
EXECUTEREALSQL.comment: Execute a Real SQL Statement with a logical connection identificator.

ENDDBTRANSACTION.name: ENDDBTRANSACTION
ENDDBTRANSACTION.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
ENDDBTRANSACTION.comment: Ends a transaction in database performing rollbak or commit.

SETAUTOLOADMODE.name: SETAUTOLOADMODE
SETAUTOLOADMODE.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
SETAUTOLOADMODE.comment:
Sets meta4object autoload mode.
See mode constants and autoload document.

SETNODEAUTOLOADMODE.name: SETNODEAUTOLOADMODE
SETNODEAUTOLOADMODE.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
SETNODEAUTOLOADMODE.comment:
Sets node autoload mod.
See mode constants and autoload document.

FLATTEN.name: FLATTEN
FLATTEN.comment:
Shifts from 3D to 2D in destination node as specified by the section view item.
If destination node is not specified it works over the same node.

UNFLATTEN.name: UNFLATTEN
UNFLATTEN.comment:
Shifts from 2D to 3D in the same node, deleting the original records.
If any item identifier is passed it considers this section view item.
If the argument is empty no item is considered (there will only be one record).

SORT.name: SORT
SORT.comment:
Sorts the current block (recordest).
if no Index identifier is specified it will take the default index for the node.

BSEARCH.name: BSEARCH
BSEARCH.comment: Search in the current block (recordset) using index and values for searching.

SETSLICEMODE.name: SETSLICEMODE
SETSLICEMODE.comment: Set slice mode for calculations to true or false.

GETARGUMENT.name: GETARGUMENT
GETARGUMENT.comment:
Returns the argument in the position arg_pos.
Count starts in 1.
If arg_pos is greater than the number of arguments it returns NULL and goes on running.

TRANSFERAPPLYVALUE.name: TRANSFERAPPLYVALUE
TRANSFERAPPLYVALUE.comment: Part of applyvalue algorithm that pivots values.

APPLYTABLE.name: APPLYTABLE
APPLYTABLE.comment:
Apply a table.
HistoricNode and OrgNode can be empty strings if we are not using historics or orgchart.

PRSETDATES.name: PRSETDATES
PRSETDATES.comment:
Sets Start and End Date in the middle node of ApplyTable.
Can be used to filter

PRSETPERIODS.name: PRSETPERIODS
PRSETPERIODS.comment: Sets Start Date-End Date as active period, adding a register in periods node if necessary. It also sets WorkDate and the slicemode used to apply tables.

OPENFILE.name: OPENFILE
OPENFILE.comment: Opens the file and returns the handle to next uses of the same file.

CLOSEFILE.name: CLOSEFILE
CLOSEFILE.comment: Closes the file referenced by a handle.

LENGTH.name: LENGTH
LENGTH.comment:
Returns the length of the text, date or number after being converted to a string. 
If value  is NULL returns NULL.
If value is a number it is converted to string as a number with 8 decimals.

TRIM.name: TRIM
TRIM.comment:
Retrieves leading or trailing spaces or both:
Direction may be:
 TRIM_LEFT=-1
 TRIM_ALL=0
 TRIM_RIGHT=1. 
If String  is NULL returns NULL.
If direction is NULL returns String.
If direction is not valid returns String unchanged.

CONVERTCASE.name: CONVERTCASE
CONVERTCASE.comment:
Converts the string to upper or lower:
 LOWERCASE=-1,
 UNCHANGED=0
 UPPERCASE=1
If String  is NULL returns NULL.
If low_up  is NULL returns String.
If low_up  is not valid returns String unchanged.

ASCII.name: ASCII
ASCII.comment:
Returns the ascii code of the first character of the string.
If string is NULL returns NULL.

CHR.name: CHR
CHR.comment:
Returns a string with the character whose ascii code is the parameter.
If code is NULL returns NULL.

REPLACE.name: REPLACE
REPLACE.comment:
Replaces a substring by a new substring in an original string and returns a string with the result.
If the string  is NULL returns NULL.
If the sbgstring to remove is NULL returns the string.
If the substring to add is NULL returns the string.

INDEXOF.name: INDEXOF
INDEXOF.comment:
Scans string forwards and returns the index of the first occurrence of substring in the string from initialindex. Returns -1 if error.
If string  is NULL returns NULL.
If substring is NULL returns -1.
If initialindex is NULL initialindex=0.

LASTINDEXOF.name: LASTINDEXOF
LASTINDEXOF.comment:
Scans string  backwards and returns the index of the first occurrence of substring in string from initialindex (backwards).
Returns -1 if error.
If String  is NULL returns NULL.
If substring is NULL returns -1.
If initialindex is NULL initialindex=0.

STTSETLABEL.name: STTSETLABEL
STTSETLABEL.comment: Sets a label for statistics in the current access (and its dependences)

GETNODEINDEX.name: GETNODEINDEX
GETNODEINDEX.comment:
Returns then Node Index.
Parameter can  node identifier, node structure alias, node structure identifier or node index.

GETNODEITEMID.name: GETNODEITEMID
GETNODEITEMID.comment:
Returns the item identifier of the node that is in the a position when it is applied a filter.
If filter is zero then position is item index.

PURGELOG.name: PURGELOG
PURGELOG.comment:
Removes some elements from the error queue.
If positive remove from the beginnig
If negative from the end.

CLCEXECUTELN4JIT.name: CLCEXECUTELN4JIT
CLCEXECUTELN4JIT.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCEXECUTELN4JIT.comment:
Compiles and executes LN4 code gives as a string.
It uses the rest of the parameters as arguments to the code.

CLCPREPAREJIT.name: CLCPREPAREJIT
CLCPREPAREJIT.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCPREPAREJIT.comment: Compiles LN4 code using the rest of parameters as arguments and returns a handle to the compiled formula to be used in later executions (with clcExecuteJIT).

READFILE.name: READFILE
READFILE.comment:
Reads the file referenced by handle.
If type is a number reads that number of chars.
If it is a char it reads until that char is reached.
Returns the number of bytes read and the string read goes in StringReturn.

DXYEAR.name: DXYEAR
DXYEAR.comment:
Returns the year of a date.
If date is NULL returns NULL.

DXCOMPARE.name: DXCOMPARE
DXCOMPARE.comment:
Compares the alphabetical order of 2 strings and returns:
+1 if the first string  precedes the second string.
-1 if  the first string follows the second.
0 if  both strings are equal.
If any of the strings is NULL returns NULL.

DXDAY.name: DXDAY
DXDAY.comment:
Returns the day of a date.
If date is NULL returns NULL.

DXDAYSOFMONTH.name: DXDAYSOFMONTH
DXDAYSOFMONTH.comment:
Returns the number of days in a month.
If any of the parameters is NULL returns NULL.

DXDATE.name: DXDATE
DXDATE.comment:
Returns a value with date formed by a day, mont and year.
If any of the parameters is NULL returns NULL.

DXDATE30.name: DXDATE30
DXDATE30.comment:
Returns a value with date30 formed by a day, mont and year.
If any of the parameters is NULL returns NULL.

DXDATEISO.name: DXDATEISO
DXDATEISO.comment:
Returns a string formatted in iso from a date yyyy-mm-dd.
If date is NULL returns NULL.

DXDATEISOD.name: DXDATEISOD
DXDATEISOD.comment:
Returns a string formatted in iso with brakets and 'd' from a date {d yyyy-mm-dd}.
If date is NULL returns NULL.

DXDATEISOTS.name: DXDATEISOTS
DXDATEISOTS.comment:
Returns a string formatted in iso with brakets and 'ts' from a date {ts yyyy-mm-dd}.
If date is NULL returns NULL.

DXINC.name: DXINC
DXINC.comment:
Increments a number or date.
If parameter is NULL returns NULL.

DXMONTH.name: DXMONTH
DXMONTH.comment:
Returns the month of a date.
If date is NULL returns NULL.

DXROUNDCENT.name: DXROUNDCENT
DXROUNDCENT.comment:
Rounds parameter to hundredths.
If parameter is NULL returns NULL

DXROUND.name: DXROUND
DXROUND.comment:
Rounds parameter.
If parameter is NULL returns NULL.

DXROUND50.name: DXROUND50
DXROUND50.comment:
Rounds parameter to 50.
If parameter is NULL returns NULL.

DXTRUNCACENT.name: DXTRUNCACENT
DXTRUNCACENT.comment:
Truncates parameter to hundredths.
If parameter is NULL returns NULL.

COPYREGISTER.name: COPYREGISTER
COPYREGISTER.comment:
Copy in current register from the register specified by meta4object, node, registerindex.
If meta4object is an empty string it will use actual meta4object.
If register  is -1 or not specified (with no filters) it will use the current in source node.

ADDFILTER.name: ADDFILTER
ADDFILTER.comment:
Adds a filter in RAM to the node with the first argument as filter.
If first argument is a string is assumed a ln4 code to determine the visible records.
If first argument is a macro specifing an operation filter will be used.

GETFILTERARGUMENT.name: GETFILTERARGUMENT
GETFILTERARGUMENT.comment:
Returns the value of a filter argument.
The argument can be the specified by identifier or position (count starts in 0).

SETFILTERARGUMENT.name: SETFILTERARGUMENT
SETFILTERARGUMENT.comment:
Sets the value of a filter argument.
Can be used with one or more pairs of argument-value.
The argument can be the specified by identifier or position (count starts in 0).

CHANNELATTRIBGETVALUE.name: CHANNELATTRIBGETVALUE
CHANNELATTRIBGETVALUE.comment:
Returns the attribute of the item passed by indirection.
Setting first argument to empty string means actual meta4object.

CHANNELATTRIBCALL.name: CHANNELATTRIBCALL
CHANNELATTRIBCALL.comment:
Executes the attribute of the item passed by indirection with the rest of the arguments passed.
Setting first argument to empty string means actual meta4object.

ADDSORTFILTER.name: ADDSORTFILTER
ADDSORTFILTER.comment:
Sorts a node just for this user.
It can use a defined index or use n pairs of item_identifier and way of ordering (see macros).

DIALOGBOX.name: DIALOGBOX
DIALOGBOX.comment:
Shows a message.
Second and third parameters must be character strings but not next ones.
Style (see macros) determines presented button.
Returns pressed button (see macros).

CURGETDECIMALS.name: CURGETDECIMALS
CURGETDECIMALS.comment:
Returns the Decimals associated with a currency.
This function should be called from EXCHANGE_RATES meta4object.

CURGETEXCHANGECURRENCY.name: CURGETEXCHANGECURRENCY
CURGETEXCHANGECURRENCY.comment: Calls item curGetExchange in the EXCHANGE_RATES meta4object (through internal level 2 call) with passed arguments.

CLCGETPOLISH.name: CLCGETPOLISH
CLCGETPOLISH.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCGETPOLISH.comment: Compiles LN4 source code from its corresponding item and places polish code in its corresponding item.

PIVOT.name: PIVOT
PIVOT.comment:
Pibots one node of a meta4object to other node of the same meta4object or other meta4object.
It uses dmd component information to do actual matching.

CROSSTAB.name: CROSSTAB
CROSSTAB.comment:
CrossTabs one node of a meta4object to other node of the same meta4object or other meta4object.
It uses dmd crosstab component information to do actual matching.

LOOKUP.name: LOOKUP
LOOKUP.comment: LookUp performs validation and list capabilities. It is designed to meet Front-End requirements.

CUREXCHANGERECORD.name: CUREXCHANGERECORD
CUREXCHANGERECORD.comment: Exchanges the currency values in the current record to a currency.

CURGETEXCHANGE.name: CURGETEXCHANGE
CURGETEXCHANGE.comment:
Returns the value exchanged form a currency to another in a date.
This function should be called from the EXCHANGE_RATES meta4object, which contains the proper exchange rates.

GETCHANNELVALUE.name: GETCHANNELVALUE
GETCHANNELVALUE.comment:
Reads the value of the item in a meta4object
The slice argument is optional.
If the record argument is left blank reads the current one.
If executing with slices and the slice argument is not specified uses the current slice.

CHANNELCALL.name: CHANNELCALL
CHANNELCALL.comment: Executes an item in a node of a meta4object.

GETCURRENT.name: GETCURRENT
GETCURRENT.comment: Returns the index of the current record and -1 if it is EOF.

OPENCHANNEL.name: OPENCHANNEL
OPENCHANNEL.comment: Opens a meta4object instance using virtual machine level 2.

CLOSECHANNEL.name: CLOSECHANNEL
CLOSECHANNEL.comment: Closes the meta4object corresponding to an instance.

DEFINEINSTANCE.name: DEFINEINSTANCE
DEFINEINSTANCE.comment:
Defines an instance of a meta4object dynamically.
IT ONLY WORKS FOR JUST IN TIME EXECUTION.

GETNODENUMBEROFITEMS.name: GETNODENUMBEROFITEMS
GETNODENUMBEROFITEMS.comment: Returns the number of items in a node that meet a filter.

GETNODEITEMREADOBJECTALIAS.name: GETNODEITEMREADOBJECTALIAS
GETNODEITEMREADOBJECTALIAS.comment: Returns an item read object alias.

GETNODEITEMWRITEOBJECTALIAS.name: GETNODEITEMWRITEOBJECTALIAS
GETNODEITEMWRITEOBJECTALIAS.comment: Returns an item write object alias.

GETNODEITEMREADFIELDID.name: GETNODEITEMREADFIELDID
GETNODEITEMREADFIELDID.comment: Returns an item read field identifier.

GETNODEITEMWRITEFIELDID.name: GETNODEITEMWRITEFIELDID
GETNODEITEMWRITEFIELDID.comment: Returns an item write field identifier.

GETNODEITEMREADOBJECTID.name: GETNODEITEMREADOBJECTID
GETNODEITEMREADOBJECTID.comment: Returns an item read object identifier.

GETNODEITEMWRITEOBJECTID.name: GETNODEITEMWRITEOBJECTID
GETNODEITEMWRITEOBJECTID.comment: Returns an item write object identifier.

SETLOG.name: SETLOG
SETLOG.comment:
Add a message to error queue.
Type can error, warning or info (see macros).

GETLOG.name: GETLOG
GETLOG.comment:
Gets a message from error queue.
If position is positive from the beginnig.
If position is negative from the end.

GETERRORSTRING.name: GETERRORSTRING
GETERRORSTRING.comment:
Returns the text associated to an error.
It formats the string with arguments passed.

MAX.name: MAX
MAX.comment:
Returns the maximum value from the range input (dates, numbers or strings convertible to numbers).
If all are NULLs returns NULL else NULLs are ignored.

ENDTRANSACTION.name: ENDTRANSACTION
ENDTRANSACTION.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
ENDTRANSACTION.comment: Ends both, a Virtual Machine and a database transaction.

CALL.name: CALL
CALL.comment: Executes an item named in a node.

MIN.name: MIN
MIN.comment:
Returns the minimum value from the range input (dates, numbers or strings convertible to numbers).
If all are NULLs returns NULL else NULLs are ignored.

FINDREGISTER.name: FINDREGISTER
FINDREGISTER.comment:
Finds a record according to criteria set in the arguments passed and using logical operators.
You can use as operations as you want (3 arguments for each logical operation) and if you want to start in a specific register number pass it as last argument.

DESTROYALLREGISTERS.name: DESTROYALLREGISTERS
DESTROYALLREGISTERS.comment: Destroyes all records in this recordset.

SETCHANNELVALUE.name: SETCHANNELVALUE
SETCHANNELVALUE.comment:
Sets the value of an item named in a meta4object.
Slice argument is optional.
If record argument is -1, it uses current one.
If executing with slices and slice argument is not specified it uses current slice.

JOINSLICES.name: JOINSLICES
JOINSLICES.comment: Joins all the records in the current block, creating a new record and deleting the original ones.

SETVALUEPRIORITY.name: SETVALUEPRIORITY
SETVALUEPRIORITY.comment:
Sets the value input to the item named with priority.
Slice argument is optional.
If record argument is -1, uses the current one.
If executing with slices and the slice argument is not specified uses the current slice.

UNLOAD.name: UNLOAD
UNLOAD.comment:
Unloads the contents of a meta4object.
It is a meta4object function.

SETCSTIMEOUT.name: SETCSTIMEOUT
SETCSTIMEOUT.comment:
Sets the current timeout.
Time is given in seconds.
Type argument can be:
0 - Sets the default CS timeout
1 - Sets the next CS timeout
2 - Sets the generic CS timeout

GETCSTIMEOUT.name: GETCSTIMEOUT
GETCSTIMEOUT.comment:
Gets the current valuse for CS timeout following the Type argument
Returns time in seconds.
Argument can be:
0 - Gets the default CS timeout
1 - Gets the next CS timeout
2 - Gets the generic CS timeout

SETCSTIMEOUTFUNCTION.name: SETCSTIMEOUTFUNCTION
SETCSTIMEOUTFUNCTION.comment: Specifies a new Tiemout function that will be called when the ClientAPI detects a timeout condition.

CONFIGCSTIMEOUT.name: CONFIGCSTIMEOUT
CONFIGCSTIMEOUT.comment:
Configures internal CS timeout features:
 Type == 0: Resets the next CS timeout to default
 Type == 1, Flag==1: Enables Timeout window
 Type == 1, Flag==0: Disables Timeout window

YTDSEARCH.name: YTDSEARCH
YTDSEARCH.comment:
Calculates the Acumulatte TIS reading from node Node.
It is not implemented for Level 2 calls, so M4Object must be "".

ISDATACACHEABLE.name: ISDATACACHEABLE
ISDATACACHEABLE.comment:
Gets the property Data Cacheable of a Meta4object
    1- it is Cacheable
    0 - it is not Cacheable
It is a Meta4object function.

SETPRIORITY.name: SETPRIORITY
SETPRIORITY.comment:
Changes an item priority.
Slice argument is optional.
If record argument is -1 it uses the current one.
If executing with slices and the slice argument is not specified it uses the current slice.

GETSERVERVALUE.name: GETSERVERVALUE
GETSERVERVALUE.comment: Gets the value of a server variable in a determined path.

CLEARFILES.name: CLEARFILES
CLEARFILES.comment:
Clean all temporal files registered in FileManager
system.

STTGETLEVEL.name: STTGETLEVEL
STTGETLEVEL.comment:
Gets the statistics (Stt) level in the current access.
Statistics level is an integer mask where every bit is an option:
0 No Stt
1 Items Stt. bit 1
2 Item Times. Stt bit 2
4 DbTimes Stt. bit 3
8 SQL Sentences Stt. bit 4
16 Values Stt. bit 5

STTSETLEVEL.name: STTSETLEVEL
STTSETLEVEL.comment:
Sets the statistics (stt) level in the current access.
Statistics level is an integer mask where every bit is an option:
0 No Stt
1 Items Stt. bit 1
2 Item Times. Stt bit 2
4 DbTimes Stt. bit 3
8 SQL Sentences Stt. bit 4
16 Values Stt. bit 5

GETVARIANTTYPE.name: GETVARIANTTYPE
GETVARIANTTYPE.comment:
Returns the variant type of variable :
VARIANT_TYPE_NULL
VARIANT_TYPE_NUMBER
VARIANT_TYPE_STRING
VARIANT_TYPE_DATE

DUMPSTATISTICS.name: DUMPSTATISTICS
DUMPSTATISTICS.comment:
Dumps statistics about memory usage for the Alias or Instance Identifier to a file.
Level can be specified:
0 - About a Meta4Object.
1 - About a Meta4Object and all Meta4Objects associated by Level 2.
For debugging purposes.

GETREGISTRYVALUE.name: GETREGISTRYVALUE
GETREGISTRYVALUE.comment: Get the value of a registry variable VarName in a determined path.

TODAYGMT.name: TODAYGMT
TODAYGMT.comment: Returns system date in GMT time.

TODAYNOWGMT.name: TODAYNOWGMT
TODAYNOWGMT.comment: Returns system date with hh, mm and seconds in GMT time.

GETNODEITEMPRECISIONEX.name: GETNODEITEMPRECISIONEX
GETNODEITEMPRECISIONEX.comment: Returns M4_TRUE if success or M4_FALSE if error. This function is equivalent to GetNodeItemPrecision, except because Precision is returned as a reference argument.

GETNODEITEMARGUMENTPOS.name: GETNODEITEMARGUMENTPOS
GETNODEITEMARGUMENTPOS.comment: Returns the Argument Position (begins in 0) for the item argument indicated.

CUREXCHANGERECORDROUNDED.name: CUREXCHANGERECORDROUNDED
CUREXCHANGERECORDROUNDED.comment: Exchanges the currency values in the current record to a currency.The function rounds all values exchanged to the number of decimals corresponding to desination currency.

CURGETEXCHANGEROUNDED.name: CURGETEXCHANGEROUNDED
CURGETEXCHANGEROUNDED.comment:
Returns the value exchanged form a currency to another in a date.
This function should be called from the EXCHANGE_RATES meta4object, which contains the proper exchange rates. It rounds the value exchanged to the number of decimals of the dest currency.

CURGETCURRENCYEXCHANGEROUNDED.name: CURGETCURRENCYEXCHANGEROUNDED
CURGETCURRENCYEXCHANGEROUNDED.comment: Calls item curGetExchange in the EXCHANGE_RATES meta4object (through internal level 2 call) with passed arguments.  It rounds the value exchanged to the number of decimals of the dest currency.

STTPERSISTTOFILE.name: STTPERSISTTOFILE
STTPERSISTTOFILE.comment: If statistics are active (Level is not 0), persists de statistics channel to the specified file.

CLCOLDTITOIDTI.name: CLCOLDTITOIDTI
CLCOLDTITOIDTI.group_name: Funciones de ejecución de código JIT
CLCOLDTITOIDTI.comment: Changes the LN4 fromula, replacing its TIs identifiers. It´s only to be used after the ExecuteBranch function.

GETNODEITEMARGUMENTNUMBER.name: GETNODEITEMARGUMENTNUMBER
GETNODEITEMARGUMENTNUMBER.comment: Returns the number of arguments of the item.

GETNODEITEMARGUMENT.name: GETNODEITEMARGUMENT
GETNODEITEMARGUMENT.comment: Returns information about an specific argument of an item.

GETUNIQUEID.name: GETUNIQUEID
GETUNIQUEID.comment:
Returns a string with a unique key of 36 characters length.
If it fails returns a null value.

SENDNODEMARK.name: SENDNODEMARK
SENDNODEMARK.comment:
Marks the current node for advanced serialization.
Default value for mode is No_BRANCH

SENDREGISTERMARK.name: SENDREGISTERMARK
SENDREGISTERMARK.comment:
Marks the current record for advanced serialization.
Default value for mode is No_BRANCH

SENDBLOCKMARK.name: SENDBLOCKMARK
SENDBLOCKMARK.comment:
Marks the current block for advanced serialization.
Default value for mode is No_BRANCH

ADDASPARTNER.name: ADDASPARTNER
ADDASPARTNER.comment:
Adds the meta4object we are calling to as a friend of the channel in which we are executing.
It is a meta4object function.

REMOVEASPARTNER.name: REMOVEASPARTNER
REMOVEASPARTNER.comment:
Removes the meta4object we are calling to as a friend of the channel in which we are executing.
It is a meta4object function.

SETPROPERTY.name: SETPROPERTY
SETPROPERTY.comment:
Sets the value of a meta4Object property.
It is a meta4object function.

GETPROPERTY.name: GETPROPERTY
GETPROPERTY.comment:
Gets the value of a meta4Object property.
It is a meta4object function.

YTDSEARCHFILTERED.name: YTDSEARCHFILTERED
YTDSEARCHFILTERED.comment:
Calculates the Acumulatte TIS reading from node Node.
It is not implemented for Level 2 calls, so M4Object must be "".
It can be used with additional conditions over the registers to read.

RND.name: RND
RND.comment: Returns a random number between 0 and the value in the argument.

GETRUNNINGSTARTDATE.name: GETRUNNINGSTARTDATE
GETRUNNINGSTARTDATE.comment: Returns the start date of the running  execution slice.

GETRUNNINGENDDATE.name: GETRUNNINGENDDATE
GETRUNNINGENDDATE.comment: Returns the end date of the running execution slice.

GETRUNNINGRUNDATE.name: GETRUNNINGRUNDATE
GETRUNNINGRUNDATE.comment: Returns the run date of the running execution slice.

MATCHREGEXP.name: MATCHREGEXP
MATCHREGEXP.comment: Match a string with a regular expresion. Returns the index of the character that starts the matching.  By default is case sensitive.(true)

LOADFROMFILE.name: LOADFROMFILE
LOADFROMFILE.comment:
Loads data into a Level 2 Meta4Object.
If it is already loaded it discards previous data.
This function cannot be applied over Meta4Objects beeing executed.
Returns error code.

PERSISTTOFILE.name: PERSISTTOFILE
PERSISTTOFILE.comment:
Persists data of a Meta4Object into a file.
If filename is not specified a non already existing file is created.
Returns filename if succees and NULL if error.

DESTROYFILE.name: DESTROYFILE
DESTROYFILE.comment:
Removes a physical file from disk.
Returns error code.

COMMONTIMESTAMP.name: COMMONTIMESTAMP
COMMONTIMESTAMP.comment:
Returns common time shared between two time intervals, using timestamps, so differences of hours in the same day does not count as a complete day.
If any of the parameters is NULL returns NULL.

CHECKMODIFY.name: CHECKMODIFY
CHECKMODIFY.comment:
Checks if data in Meta4Object has changed.
Returns TRUE if there is anything to persist.
Returns FALSE otherwise.

OPENCHANNELEX.name: OPENCHANNELEX
OPENCHANNELEX.comment: Opens a meta4object instance. It allows to specify organization and access type.

DATEADD.name: DATEADD
DATEADD.comment: Add units to a date, where units can be of different type. See constants.

DATEDIFF.name: DATEDIFF
DATEDIFF.comment: Gets the difference betweend 2 dates in diferent units.

LOG.name: LOG
LOG.comment: Returns the logarithm of the number in the specified base. If base is not specified, natural base is assumed.

GETNODEREADOBJECTID.name: GETNODEREADOBJECTID
GETNODEREADOBJECTID.comment: Returns the node Read Logic Object Id.

GETNODEWRITEOBJECTID.name: GETNODEWRITEOBJECTID
GETNODEWRITEOBJECTID.comment: Returns the node Write Logic Object Id.

RESETEXECUTEGROUP.name: RESETEXECUTEGROUP
RESETEXECUTEGROUP.comment: Reset the priority (set 3, minimun priority) of all the group concepts values.

DEFINEINSTANCEEX.name: DEFINEINSTANCEEX
DEFINEINSTANCEEX.comment: Defines an instance of a meta4object dynamically.

EXISTNODEITEMINDEX.name: EXISTNODEITEMINDEX
EXISTNODEITEMINDEX.comment: Returns an item index without dumping error if item does not exist.

GETNODEITEMDATA.name: GETNODEITEMDATA
GETNODEITEMDATA.comment: Returns item metadata information. Information type is specified by DataType argument (see macros).

GETHANDLE.name: GETHANDLE
GETHANDLE.comment: Returns the unique numeric identifier of a Meta4Object instance.

INSERTCHANNEL.name: INSERTCHANNEL
INSERTCHANNEL.comment: Creates a new level 2 access to the Meta4Object given by handle iM4ObjHandle and associates it to instance given by sInstanceId.

ISBLOCKUPDATED.name: ISBLOCKUPDATED
ISBLOCKUPDATED.comment: Checks if block items are modified.

ISNODEUPDATED.name: ISNODEUPDATED
ISNODEUPDATED.comment: Checks if node items are modified.

ISNEWANDDELETED.name: ISNEWANDDELETED
ISNEWANDDELETED.comment: Returns TRUE if the record is marked as new and deleted.

GETCHANNELNUMBEROFNODES.name: GETCHANNELNUMBEROFNODES
GETCHANNELNUMBEROFNODES.comment: Returns the number of nodes of a Meta4Object.

GETNODEDATA.name: GETNODEDATA
GETNODEDATA.comment: Returns node metadata information. Information type is specified by DataType argument (see macros).

DATE30EX.name: DATE30EX
DATE30EX.comment: Returns the date using a 30-day month calendar (typical for payroll).

DXDATE30EX.name: DXDATE30EX
DXDATE30EX.comment: Returns a value with date30 formed by a day, month and year.

SLEEP.name: SLEEP
SLEEP.comment: Stops execution during a number of seconds.

EXECUTEBRANCH.name: EXECUTEBRANCH
EXECUTEBRANCH.comment: Executes the item ItemName in all nodes starting in the root node in a register (if Scope is Register), in a block (if Scope is Block) or in the complete node (if Scope is Node) and descending in the hierarchy upto the leaf-nodes.

ERASEALLL2INSTANCES.name: ERASEALLL2INSTANCES
ERASEALLL2INSTANCES.comment: Erases all level2 instances of the meta4object dynamically.

GETBOOKMARK.name: GETBOOKMARK
GETBOOKMARK.comment: Returns a new bookmark handle for actual position.

RELEASEBOOKMARK.name: RELEASEBOOKMARK
RELEASEBOOKMARK.comment: Releases resources associated to a given bookmark.

GETCHANNELDATA.name: GETCHANNELDATA
GETCHANNELDATA.comment: Returns Meta4Object metadata information. Information type is specified by DataType argument (see macros).

LOADXML.name: LOADXML
LOADXML.comment: Imports XML data into a Meta4Object.

EXPORTXML.name: EXPORTXML
EXPORTXML.comment: Exports XML data from a Meta4Object.

SETLOADRANGE.name: SETLOADRANGE
SETLOADRANGE.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
SETLOADRANGE.comment: Sets first record and number of records to load.

COPYBRANCH.name: COPYBRANCH
COPYBRANCH.comment: Saves a record and its children to a file.

PASTEBRANCH.name: PASTEBRANCH
PASTEBRANCH.comment: Restores a record and its children from a file previously saved using CopyBranch.

SETLOADTIMEOUT.name: SETLOADTIMEOUT
SETLOADTIMEOUT.group_name: Funciones de base de datos lógica
SETLOADTIMEOUT.comment: Sets maximum execution timeout in seconds.

CHANNELATTRIBGETSLICEVALUE.name: CHANNELATTRIBGETSLICEVALUE
CHANNELATTRIBGETSLICEVALUE.comment:
Returns the attribute of the item passed by indirection in one slice.
Setting first argument to empty string means actual meta4object.

GETTHISITEMID.name: GETTHISITEMID
GETTHISITEMID.comment: Returns the identifier of the current item.

FINDVALUE.name: FINDVALUE
FINDVALUE.comment: Finds a value in a record, given a comparison function and a stating ítem.

SENDMESSAGE.name: SENDMESSAGE
SENDMESSAGE.comment: Sends a message to jobscheduler queue.

SENDTEXT.name: SENDTEXT
SENDTEXT.comment: Sends a text message to a queue.

IMPORTJSON.name: IMPORTJSON
IMPORTJSON.comment: Fills Meta4Object contents with data from a JSON

CONVERTONEWAYSHA.name: CONVERTONEWAYSHA
CONVERTONEWAYSHA.comment: Encripta una cadena con el algoritmo sha 512.

GETACCESSTOKEN.name: GETACCESSTOKEN
GETACCESSTOKEN.comment: Obtiene un token de acceso del proveedor de identidad.
